sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 47:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 47:1
items.html: Two lights in the vessel of Hochma, which are ZON, and three lights in the vessel of Bina, which are the male and female of Bina, and the light Hesed in Bina, containing the whole ZAT. (Inner Light, Item‎ 55)
